query: INSERT INTO categories (establishmentId, name, description, sortOrder, isActive) VALUES (210005, 'Softs', 'Bebidas não alcoólicas', 14, 1); SET @cat_softs = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder) VALUES (210005, @cat_softs, 'Softs', 'Escolha sua bebida', '0.00', 'active', 1); SET @prod_softs = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementGroups (productId, name, minQuantity, maxQuantity, isRequired, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@prod_softs, 'Escolha sua bebida', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1); SET @grp_softs = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementItems (groupId, name, price, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@grp_softs, 'Água Mineral', '4.99', 1, 1), (@grp_softs, 'Coca-Cola 290ml', '6.50', 1, 2), (@grp_softs, 'Guaraná Lata', '6.50', 1, 3), (@grp_softs, 'Suco Natural', '14.90', 1, 4), (@grp_softs, 'Tônica', '7.50', 1, 5);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute INSERT INTO categories (establishmentId, name, description, sortOrder, isActive) VALUES (210005, 'Softs', 'Bebidas não alcoólicas', 14, 1); SET @cat_softs = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder) VALUES (210005, @cat_softs, 'Softs', 'Escolha sua bebida', '0.00', 'active', 1); SET @prod_softs = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementGroups (productId, name, minQuantity, maxQuantity, isRequired, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@prod_softs, 'Escolha sua bebida', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1); SET @grp_softs = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementItems (groupId, name, price, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@grp_softs, 'Água Mineral', '4.99', 1, 1), (@grp_softs, 'Coca-Cola 290ml', '6.50', 1, 2), (@grp_softs, 'Guaraná Lata', '6.50', 1, 3), (@grp_softs, 'Suco Natural', '14.90', 1, 4), (@grp_softs, 'Tônica', '7.50', 1, 5);
